parts:
I am building an e-commerce website. I need you to write
code for the Inventory Management System.

Requirements:
Backend (Node.js): Create an API to handle stock updates.
When a user buys an item, deduct the stock. If the stock is
low (less than 5), print a log message. Also, keep a
history of stock changes.

Frontend (React): Create a simple dashboard page to view
current stock levels and a list of low-stock items. Please
provide the code for both the backend controller and the
frontend component.
I don't know how to program. Can you please organize all the code into the correct folder structure and provide a ZIP file for me to download?

Your complete project is ready 🎉  

You can download it here:

👉 **[Download the Inventory Management System ZIP](sandbox:/mnt/data/inventory-management-system.zip)**

---

# 📦 What’s Inside the ZIP

```
inventory-management-system/
│
├── backend/
│   ├── server.js
│   ├── package.json
│   ├── controllers/
│   │   └── inventoryController.js
│   └── routes/
│       └── inventoryRoutes.js
│
└── frontend/
    ├── package.json
    ├── public/
    │   └── index.html
    └── src/
        ├── index.js
        └── InventoryDashboard.js
```

---

# 🚀 How To Run It (Step-By-Step)

### 1️⃣ Extract the ZIP file

### 2️⃣ Start Backend

Open Terminal:

```bash
cd inventory-management-system/backend
npm install
npm start
```

You should see:
```
Server running on port 5000
```

---

### 3️⃣ Start Frontend (New Terminal Window)

```bash
cd inventory-management-system/frontend
npm install
npm start
```

It will automatically open:

```
http://localhost:3000
```

---

If you want, I can also:

- 🐳 Create a Docker version (one command to start everything)
- 📊 Add stock charts
- 🔐 Add login system
- 🗄️ Connect to MongoDB database

Just tell me what you'd like next 😊
